cardiac_check.title: Audit your Cardiac health — ensure maximum HP is stable and no Sculk Sickness stage is active

stamina_full.title: Reach full Peak Stamina capacity — train stamina to maximum via sustained sprint/swim/climb activity

subtitle.text: Peak Stamina. Cardiac health. Sculk Sickness status. Pressure tolerance. Ch15 is when you check all systems.

description: CH.15 · BODY AUDIT
▸ Ch13-14 put your body through everything.
The End dimensions strip health in specific ways.
Sculk Sickness accumulates from Sculk proximity.
Peak Stamina degrades if you went sedentary during long craft sessions.
Cardiac health may have taken hits from boss fights.
Ch15 is the homecoming maintenance window.
Audit everything. Repair everything. Enter Ch16 at full capacity.
◈ SCULK SICKNESS AUDIT
└ Sculk Sickness accumulates in 5 stages from Sculk exposure
(Ancient Cities, Sculk veins, Warden areas)
└ Stage 1-2: minor debuffs (slightly reduced max HP, regen)
└ Stage 3-5: severe debuffs (significant HP reduction, blindness)
└ Cure: Ambrosia item — check JEI for craft recipe
(Ambrosia removes 1 stage per use; multiple doses for high stage)
└ Prevention: avoid Sculk blocks without Silk Touch / appropriate gear
└ Vile Herb (Cursed Eye ingredient): involves Sculk — check your stage
before any further Sculk-adjacent crafting
◈ PEAK STAMINA TRAINING
└ Peak Stamina (Peak Stamina mod) governs your max stamina bar
└ Training: sprint, swim, and climb to increase max capacity
└ Ch15 Elytra usage also trains stamina via sustained activity
└ Full stamina: enables longer sprint chains + faster recovery
└ Ch17 boss fights benefit from full stamina (dodge chains)
◈ CARDIAC + PRESSURE
└ Cardiac: heart rate mechanic — monitor via HUD indicator
High-intensity boss fights spike rate, causing damage if prolonged
Recovery: rest period after boss fight (stop sprinting, eat)
└ Pressure: depth/environment pressure — relevant in ocean/cave
Ch15 ocean exploration (Small Ships): watch Pressure HUD
Pressure resistance gear: Aqua Affinity helmet + Depth Strider
▸ The body you came back with from the End
is not the same body you left with.
You absorbed Sculk. You took boss hits.
You pushed stamina to maintain flight.
You ignored the Cardiac warning three times.
Ch15 is the maintenance check.
Frieren survived 1000 years by paying attention
to what her body needed.
Pay attention.
▶ Audit Cardiac and confirm no Sculk Sickness [check]
▶ Reach full Peak Stamina capacity [check]
◇ Ambrosia for Sculk Sickness cure: check JEI.
The cure likely involves food/potion ingredients from existing mods.
Farm the ingredients before they accumulate into Stage 3+.
Stage 5 Sculk Sickness is an emergency — cure immediately.
